title: Save a valid trade to the journal from the Risk Calculator
description: Verifies a user can enter valid inputs and save a new trade entry that appears in the Journal.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify page title contains "Risk"
Type "BTC/USDT" into the Asset Pair input field
Type "1000" into the Capital input field (data-testid="input-modal")
Type "2" into the Risk % input field (data-testid="input-risiko")
Type "50000" into the Entry Price input field (data-testid="input-entry")
Type "49000" into the Stop Loss Price input field (data-testid="input-stoploss")
Click "Save to Journal" button (data-testid="btn-calculate")
Click on the "Journal" navigation link
Verify URL contains "/journal"
Verify text "BTC/USDT" is visible

title: Save works at boundary value Risk % = 5% with valid prices
description: Verifies a trade can be saved when risk is exactly at the allowed maximum (5%).

steps.description: Navigate to /
Type "ETH/USDT" into the Asset Pair input field
Type "2000" into the Capital input field (data-testid="input-modal")
Type "5" into the Risk % input field (data-testid="input-risiko")
Type "3000" into the Entry Price input field (data-testid="input-entry")
Type "2850" into the Stop Loss Price input field (data-testid="input-stoploss")
Click "Save to Journal" button (data-testid="btn-calculate")
Click on the "Journal" navigation link
Verify text "ETH/USDT" is visible

title: Save a trade with a decimal Risk % and decimal prices
description: Verifies the calculator accepts decimal inputs and still allows saving a valid trade.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Type "SOL/USDT" into the Asset Pair input field
Type "1500.50" into the Capital input field (data-testid="input-modal")
Type "1.5" into the Risk % input field (data-testid="input-risiko")
Type "123.45" into the Entry Price input field (data-testid="input-entry")
Type "120.10" into the Stop Loss Price input field (data-testid="input-stoploss")
Type "2" into the Target Ratio input field (data-testid="input-ratio")
Click "Save to Journal" button (data-testid="btn-calculate")
Click on the "Journal" navigation link
Verify text "SOL/USDT" is visible

title: View journal entries list on /journal when entries exist
description: Verifies that the Trading Journal page displays a list of existing trade entries.

steps.description: Navigate to /journal
Verify page title contains "Journal"
Verify element "Trade entries list" is visible
Verify element "Winning" button is visible on at least one entry
Verify element "Losing" button is visible on at least one entry
Verify element "Delete" icon is visible on at least one entry

title: Mark a trade as Won using the Winning button
description: Verifies a selected entry can be marked as Won and the UI reflects the updated status.

steps.description: Navigate to /journal
Verify element "Trade entries list" is visible
Click "Winning" button (data-testid="btn-won") on the first visible trade entry
Verify text "Won" is visible within the same trade entry
Verify element "Winning" button (data-testid="btn-won") is visible on the page
Verify element "Losing" button (data-testid="btn-lost") is visible on the page

title: Mark a trade as Lost using the Losing button
description: Verifies a selected entry can be marked as Lost and the UI reflects the updated status.

steps.description: Navigate to /journal
Verify element "Trade entries list" is visible
Click "Losing" button (data-testid="btn-lost") on the first visible trade entry
Verify text "Lost" is visible within the same trade entry
Verify element "Winning" button (data-testid="btn-won") is visible on the page
Verify element "Delete" icon (data-testid="btn-delete") is visible on the page

title: Delete a single trade entry using the Delete icon
description: Verifies that a trade entry can be removed from the journal list via the Delete control.

steps.description: Navigate to /journal
Verify element "Trade entries list" is visible
Click Delete icon (data-testid="btn-delete") on the first visible trade entry
Verify element "Trade entries list" is visible
Verify text "No entries" is visible OR at least one trade entry remains visible
Verify element "Delete All" (data-testid="btn-delete-all") is visible

title: Status change persists after page reload (Won)
description: Verifies that after marking an entry as Won, reloading /journal still shows the Won status (persistence).

steps.description: Navigate to /journal
Verify element "Trade entries list" is visible
Click "Winning" button (data-testid="btn-won") on the first visible trade entry
Verify text "Won" is visible within the same trade entry
Navigate to /journal
Verify text "Won" is visible on the page

title: Status change persists after page reload (Lost)
description: Verifies that after marking an entry as Lost, reloading /journal still shows the Lost status (persistence).

steps.description: Navigate to /journal
Verify element "Trade entries list" is visible
Click "Losing" button (data-testid="btn-lost") on the first visible trade entry
Verify text "Lost" is visible within the same trade entry
Navigate to /journal
Verify text "Lost" is visible on the page

title: Create an unrealistic trade, then evaluate and expect specific roast phrase
description: Verifies that after saving an unrealistic risk/reward trade to the journal, the AI evaluation returns feedback that includes the phrase "greedy dreamers".

steps.description: Navigate to /
Type "10000" into "Capital" input field
Type "1" into "Risk %" input field
Type "100" into "Entry Price" input field
Type "95" into "Stop Loss Price" input field
Type "1:15" into "Target Ratio" input field
Click "Save to Journal" button
Click "Journal" navigation link
Click "Evaluate My Journal" button
Verify text "Analyzing Discipline..." is visible
Verify text "greedy dreamers" is visible
